step_rationale: Nitroxidative stress marker of inflammatory activation within the coronary thrombus.
mechanism: 3-nitrotyrosine accumulation reflects reactive nitrogen species generation by activated leukocytes and platelets during thrombotic coronary occlusion.

references.title: Thrombus Aspirated from Patients with ST-Elevation Myocardial Infarction: Association between 3-Nitrotyrosine and Inflammatory Markers - Insights from ARTERIA Study.
